## NoteCategory type

Category for notes associated with an entity. Uses the standard base ID pattern (alphanumeric, dashes, underscores). Examples: 'general', 'tasting', 'production'

**Signature:**

```typescript
export type NoteCategory = Brand<string, 'NoteCategory'>;
```
